description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:stable-slim Docker image and a before_script that runs apt-get update, installs make gcc g++ libboost-dev liblua5.3-dev git curl, adds the Node.js 20 repository, installs nodejs, prints node and npm versions, and globally installs eclint via npm. Define a default test stage and add a compile job that executes make, then make install, and finally runs bash ./src/ci_test.sh. Add a validate job that runs bash ./validate.sh. Both jobs inherit the before_script and have no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
